keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Print detailed information about the current sketch set.

keywords.name: metadata
keywords.description: Print all metadata assigned to the current sketch set.

keywords.name: polygons
keywords.description: For each closed polygon detected in the set, list edge IDs that form polygon’s external boundary.

keywords.name: quality
keywords.description: Print a zone quality report for the current sketch set. This includes the number of zones that, when created from the set, may result in “bad geometry” errors.
